title: Workplace Operations Manager
description: Leading workplace operations across Rho's SF and NYC offices — managing a multi-floor office build-out, vendor relationships, employee experience programming, and internal communications.
highlights: Managing full build-out of 325 Pacific Ave SF headquarters across 3 floors, coordinating 15+ vendors from demolition through move-in
Built and manage the full vendor lifecycle — onboarding, COI compliance, invoice auditing, and contract negotiation
Designed and execute employee experience programming: events, Slack newsletters, wellness activations, and surprise-and-delight initiatives
Developed repeatable office operations playbooks applied across SF and NYC locations
